nasb.text: And you have spoken arrogantly against Me and have multiplied your words against Me; I have heard it.”

esv.text: And you magnified yourselves against me with your mouth, and multiplied your words against me; I heard it.

cnv.text: 你們用口說誇大的話攻擊我，說出許多話來與我作對，我都聽見了。

ccb.text: 你妄自尊大，肆意毁谤我，我都听见了。
